entry.title: 「CF1263F」Economic Difficulties
entry.summary:
An electrical grid in Berland palaces consists of 2 grids: main and reserve. Wires in palaces are made of expensive material, so selling some of them would be a good idea!

Each grid (main and reserve) has a head node (its number is 1). Every other node gets electricity from the head node. Each node can be reached from the head node by a unique path. Also, both grids have exactly n nodes, which do not spread electricity further.
entry.content:
An electrical grid in Berland palaces consists of 2 grids: main and reserve. Wires in palaces are made of expensive material, so selling some of them would be a good idea!

Each grid (main and reserve) has a head node (its number is 1). Every other node gets electricity from the head node. Each node can be reached from the head node by a unique path. Also, both grids have exactly n nodes, which do not spread electricity further.

In other words, every grid is a rooted directed tree on n leaves with a root in the node, which number is 1. Each tree has independent enumeration and nodes from one grid are not connected with nodes of another grid.

Also, the palace has n electrical devices. Each device is connected with one node of the main grid and with one node of the reserve grid. Devices connect only with nodes, from which electricity is not spread further (these nodes are the tree's leaves). Each grid's leaf is connected with exactly one device.

In this example the main grid contains 6 nodes (the top tree) and the reserve grid contains 4 nodes (the lower tree). There are 3 devices with numbers colored in blue.
It is guaranteed that the whole grid (two grids and 𝑛 devices) can be shown in this way (like in the picture above):

main grid is a top tree, whose wires are directed 'from the top to the down',
reserve grid is a lower tree, whose wires are directed 'from the down to the top',
devices — horizontal row between two grids, which are numbered from 1 to 𝑛 from the left to the right,
wires between nodes do not intersect.
Formally, for each tree exists a depth-first search from the node with number 1, that visits leaves in order of connection to devices 1,2,…,𝑛 (firstly, the node, that is connected to the device 1, then the node, that is connected to the device 2, etc.).

Businessman wants to sell (remove) maximal amount of wires so that each device will be powered from at least one grid (main or reserve). In other words, for each device should exist at least one path to the head node (in the main grid or the reserve grid), which contains only nodes from one grid.

链接🔗

「CodeForces 1263F」Economic Difficulties

题解

n<=2000n<=2000n<=2000，考虑DP做法,DP[t][i][j]DP[t][i][j]DP[t][i][j],表示第 ttt 棵树将 i−ji-ji−j 区间断电最多能删除多少边
然后L[i],R[i]L[i],R[i]L[i],R[i]用来维护该节点维护下面覆盖了那些子节点，最后再用DP合并一些即可

代码

#include <cstdio>
#include <cstring>
#include <vector>
#include <iostream>
#include <algorithm>
#include <queue>
#include <map>
#include <string>
using namespace std;
const int maxd = 2e3+10;
vector<int> G[2][maxd];
int dp[maxd],v[2][maxd][maxd],l[2][maxd],r[2][maxd],sz[2][maxd];
// L[i]，R[i]表示将盖以i节点为根子树删掉，最多能使得[L,R]区间内的发电机停电
int n,a;
void dfs(int id,int x)
{
    if(x!=1) sz[id][x] = 1; // N个点n-1条边，根节点无父边
    for(int v :G[id][x])
    {
        dfs(id,v);
        l[id][x] = min(l[id][x],l[id][v]);
        r[id][x] = max(r[id][x],r[id][v]);
        sz[id][x] += sz[id][v];
    }
    int ll = l[id][x],rr = r[id][x];
    v[id][ll][rr] = max(v[id][ll][rr],sz[id][x]);    // 代价是该子树的大小
}
int main()
{
//    freopen("a.in","r",stdin);
//    freopen("k.out","w",stdout);
    int n;scanf("%d",&n);
    for(int t=0;t < 2;t++)
    {
        int m;scanf("%d",&m);
        for(int i=1;i<=m;i++)
        {
            l[t][i] = m+1;
            r[t][i] = 0;
        }
        for(int i=2;i<=m;i++)
        {
            int x; scanf("%d",&x);
            G[t][x].push_back(i);
        }
        for(int i=1;i<=n;i++)
        {
            int x;scanf("%d",&x);
            l[t][x] = r[t][x] = i;
        }
        dfs(t,1);
    }
    for(int i=1;i<=n;i++)
        for(int j=i;j<=n;j++)
            dp[j] = max(dp[j], dp[i-1] + max(v[0][i][j],v[1][i][j]));
    printf("%d\n",dp[n]);
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 「CodeForces 1261D」Wrong Answer on test 233
entry.summary:
This is the harder version of the problem. In this version, 1≤𝑛≤2⋅105. You can hack this problem if you locked it. But you can hack the previous problem only if you locked both problems.

The problem is to finish 𝑛 one-choice-questions. Each of the questions contains 𝑘 options, and only one of them is correct. The answer to the 𝑖-th question is ℎ𝑖, and if your answer of the question 𝑖 is ℎ𝑖, you earn 1 point, otherwise, you earn 0 points for this question. The values ℎ1,ℎ2,…,ℎ𝑛 are known to you in this problem.
entry.content:
This is the harder version of the problem. In this version, 1≤𝑛≤2⋅105. You can hack this problem if you locked it. But you can hack the previous problem only if you locked both problems.

The problem is to finish 𝑛 one-choice-questions. Each of the questions contains 𝑘 options, and only one of them is correct. The answer to the 𝑖-th question is ℎ𝑖, and if your answer of the question 𝑖 is ℎ𝑖, you earn 1 point, otherwise, you earn 0 points for this question. The values ℎ1,ℎ2,…,ℎ𝑛 are known to you in this problem.

However, you have a mistake in your program. It moves the answer clockwise! Consider all the 𝑛 answers are written in a circle. Due to the mistake in your program, they are shifted by one cyclically.

Formally, the mistake moves the answer for the question 𝑖 to the question 𝑖mod𝑛+1. So it moves the answer for the question 1 to question 2, the answer for the question 2 to the question 3, ..., the answer for the question 𝑛 to the question 1.

We call all the 𝑛 answers together an answer suit. There are 𝑘𝑛 possible answer suits in total.

You're wondering, how many answer suits satisfy the following condition: after moving clockwise by 1, the total number of points of the new answer suit is strictly larger than the number of points of the old one. You need to find the answer modulo 998244353.

For example, if 𝑛=5, and your answer suit is 𝑎=[1,2,3,4,5], it will submitted as 𝑎′=[5,1,2,3,4] because of a mistake. If the correct answer suit is ℎ=[5,2,2,3,4], the answer suit 𝑎 earns 1 point and the answer suite 𝑎′ earns 4 points. Since 4>1, the answer suit 𝑎=[1,2,3,4,5] should be counted.

链接🔗

「CodeForces 1261D」Wrong Answer on test 233

题解

考虑每个位置所填答案对正确数量的影响。如果s[i]==s[i+1]s[i] == s[i+1]s[i]==s[i+1]，那么正确数量无论如何都不会发生变化，因为 如果所填答案 x==s[i]x== s[i]x==s[i] 那么 x==s[i+1]x == s[i+1]x==s[i+1] ，反之亦然。
如果s[i]!=s[i+1]s[i] != s[i+1]s[i]!=s[i+1] 那么就会出现3种情况
正确数量加1，x != s[i] && x == s[i+1]
正确数量减1，x == s[i] && x != s[i+1]
正确数量不变, other
所有位置填写答案的不同方案总数为knk^nkn,会有正确答案多于原先的，正确答案少于原先的，正确答案等于原先的三种情况，思考后可以发现，多于原先和少于原先的方案数是相等的，所以我们所求多于原先的方案数可以转化为求(总方案数 - 答案等于原先方案数)/2，
因为要求答案数等于原先方案数，所以当选取了iii个正确数量+1的方案数时，就必须选对应的iii个正确数量-1的方案数，所以我们可以考虑枚举iii,然后通过组合原理求出总数

代码

#include <cstdio>
#include <cstring>
#include <vector>
#include <algorithm>
using namespace std;
const int maxd = 2e5+10;
typedef long long ll;
const int mod = 998244353;
int n,k,num,a[maxd];
long long fac[maxd];
ll pow(ll a,ll b)
{
    ll ans = 1ll;
    while(b)
    {
        if(b&1) ans = ans * a %mod;
        a = a * a % mod;
        b /= 2;
    }
    return ans;
}
ll C(ll a,ll b)
{
    return 1ll* (fac[a] * pow(fac[b],1ll * mod-2) % mod) * pow(fac[a-b],mod-2) %mod;
}
int main()
{
//    freopen("a.in","r",stdin);
//    freopen("k.out","w",stdout);
    scanf("%d %d",&n,&k);
    if(k == 1) {printf("0");return 0;}
    for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) scanf("%d",&a[i]);
    for(int i=1;i<n;i++) if(a[i] != a[i+1]) num++; num += (a[1] != a[n]);
 
    fac[0] = 1ll;for(int i=1;i<maxd;i++) fac[i] = 1ll * fac[i-1] * i %mod;
 
//    for(int i=1;i<=n;i++)
//
    long long ans = 0ll;
 
    for(int i=0;i * 2 <= num;i++) {
        long long tmp = C(num, i) * C(num - i, i) % mod * pow(k - 2, num - i - i) % mod * pow(k, n-num) % mod;
        ans = (tmp + ans) % mod;
    }
    //for(int i=1;i<=10;i++) printf("%lld \n",pow(2,i));
    printf("%lld\n",((pow(k,n) - ans)%mod  + mod ) %mod * pow(2,mod-2) %mod );
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 「Gym 101775L」SOS
entry.summary: Mr. Panda and Mr. Sheep are playing a game on a 1 × N game board. Initially, all the cells are empty. Mr. Panda and Mr. Sheep take alternate moves and Mr.Panda moves first.
entry.content:
Mr. Panda and Mr. Sheep are playing a game on a 1 × N game board. Initially, all the cells are empty. Mr. Panda and Mr. Sheep take alternate moves and Mr.Panda moves first.

On each move, a player must fill an 'S' or 'O' into an empty cell. After the move, if there are 3 consecutive cells from left to right form the word "SOS", the player wins the game and the game finished.

If the board gets filled up without SOS appearing consecutively, no one wins the game, the game end with draw.

Now, if both Mr. Panda and Mr. Sheep play optimally, find out the result of the game.

链接🔗

「Gym 101775L」SOS

题解

最短的分出胜利的结构是 S _ _ S _ ,但是如果先手S _ _ _ _ 后手肯定不可能放S 因为只要S _ _ S _,S _ _ _ S ,S _ S _ _ 最后都是都是先手赢。
那么最短的就是 _ _ _ S _ _ _ 因为不管后手破坏哪一边都能在另外一边构造出S _ _ S,那么最短出现结果的就是7,如果是偶数的话,由于Mr.熊猫是先手,他不能获得胜利那么就要破坏别人的,能推脱平局,比如10 --> _ _ _ _ S _ _ _ _ _ 4,5。两边都分不出结果。
当N=15的时候 _ _ _ _ _ _ _ S _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 7,7 ,但是n等于15是奇数,所以从16开始就是Mr.羊获胜,否则就能给Mr.熊猫拖成平局

代码

#include <cstdio>
#include <cstring>
#include <algorithm>
using namespace std;
const int maxd = 1e5+10;
int a[maxd];
int main()
{
//    freopen("a.in","r",stdin);
//    freopen("k.out","w",stdout);
    int t;scanf("%d",&t);
    //printf("%lld\n",t);
    for(int tt = 1;tt <= t;tt++)
    {
        int n;scanf("%d",&n);
        int flag;
        if(n < 7) flag = 1;
        else if(n %2 == 0 && n < 16)  flag =1;
        else if(n %2 == 0 )flag =0;
        else flag = 2;
        if(flag == 1) printf("Case #%d: Draw\n",tt);
        else if(flag == 2) printf("Case #%d: Panda\n",tt);
        else printf("Case #%d: Sheep\n",tt);
    }
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 「HDU 6191 」Query on A Tree
entry.summary:
Monkey A lives on a tree, he always plays on this tree.

One day, monkey A learned about one of the bit-operations, xor. He was keen of this interesting operation and wanted to practise it at once.

Monkey A gave a value to each node on the tree. And he was curious about a problem.

The problem is how large the xor result of number x and one node value of label y can be, when giving you a non-negative integer x and a node label u indicates that node y is in the subtree whose root is u(y can be equal to u).

Can you help him?
entry.content:
Monkey A lives on a tree, he always plays on this tree.

One day, monkey A learned about one of the bit-operations, xor. He was keen of this interesting operation and wanted to practise it at once.

Monkey A gave a value to each node on the tree. And he was curious about a problem.

The problem is how large the xor result of number x and one node value of label y can be, when giving you a non-negative integer x and a node label u indicates that node y is in the subtree whose root is u(y can be equal to u).

Can you help him?

链接🔗

「HDU 6191 」Query on A Tree

题解

可持久化trie? 有点感觉01Tri有点像线段树
主要技巧在用dfs序维护trie，然后子树范围等于id[x]−1id[x]-1id[x]−1 至 id[x]+size[x]−1id[x] + size[x]-1id[x]+size[x]−1

代码

#include <cstdio>
#include <vector>
#include <cstring>
#include <algorithm>
using namespace std;
const int maxd = 1e5+10;
int t[maxd*32][2],val[maxd*32][2],sz[maxd];
int rt[maxd],tot,num;
int v[maxd],id[maxd];
vector<int> G[maxd];
void insert(int &now,int last,int x,int p)
{   
    now = ++tot;if(p<0) return;
    int c = (x >> p) & 1;
    t[now][0] = t[last][0];
    t[now][1] = t[last][1];
    val[now][c] = val[last][c]+1;
    val[now][c^1] = val[last][c^1];
    insert(t[now][c],t[last][c],x,p-1);
}
int query(int now,int last,int x)
{
    int ans = 0;
    for(int i=30;i>=0;i--)
    {
        int c = (x >> i) & 1;
        if(val[now][c^1] - val[last][c^1] > 0) ans += (1<<i),c^=1;
        now = t[now][c], last = t[last][c];
    }
    return ans;
}
void dfs(int x)
{
    id[x] = ++num;sz[x]=1;
    insert(rt[id[x]],rt[id[x]-1],v[x],30);
    for(int i= 0;i<G[x].size();i++)
    {
        int v = G[x][i];dfs(v);
        sz[x] += sz[v];
    }
}

int main()
{
    // freopen("a.in","r",stdin);
    // freopen("k.out","w",stdout);

    int n,m;
    while(scanf("%d %d",&n,&m)!=EOF)
    {
        memset(t,0,sizeof(t));
        memset(rt,0,sizeof(rt));
        memset(val,0,sizeof(val));
        num  = tot = 0;

        for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) scanf("%d",&v[i]);
        //printf("%d %d\n",n,m);
        for(int i=2;i<=n;i++)
        {
           int x;scanf("%d",&x);
           G[x].push_back(i);
        }
        int root  = 1;
        dfs(root);
        // for(int i=1;i<=n;i++)
        //     printf("%d %d\n",i,rt[i]);

        for(int i=1;i<=m;i++)
        {
           int x,y;scanf("%d %d",&x,&y);
           //printf("%d %d\n",id[x]+sz[x]-1,id[x]-1);
           printf("%d\n",query(rt[id[x]+sz[x]-1],rt[id[x]-1],y));
        }
        for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) G[i].clear();
    }
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 「HDU 6184」Counting Stars
entry.summary:
Little A is an astronomy lover, and he has found that the sky was so beautiful!

So he is counting stars now!

There are n stars in the sky, and little A has connected them by m non-directional edges.

It is guranteed that no edges connect one star with itself, and every two edges connect different pairs of stars.
entry.content:
Little A is an astronomy lover, and he has found that the sky was so beautiful!

So he is counting stars now!

There are n stars in the sky, and little A has connected them by m non-directional edges.

It is guranteed that no edges connect one star with itself, and every two edges connect different pairs of stars.

Now little A wants to know that how many different "A-Structure"s are there in the sky, can you help him?

An "A-structure" can be seen as a non-directional subgraph G, with a set of four nodes V and a set of five edges E.

If V=(A,B,C,D) and E=(AB,BC,CD,DA,AC), we call G as an "A-structure".

It is defined that "A-structure" G1=V1+E1 and G2=V2+E2 are same only in the condition that V1=V2 and E1=E2.

链接🔗

「HDU 6184」Counting Stars

题解

给定的图可以看成是两个共单边的三元环
所以题目转化为求三元环的方案数
统计每条边被多少三元环覆盖，计为cnt[i]cnt[i]cnt[i]
通过组合排列，可得到答案为

ans=∑inCcnt[i]2ans = \sum_i^n C_{cnt[i]}^2 ans=i∑n​Ccnt[i]2​

代码

#include <cstdio>
#include <vector>
#include <cstring>
#include <algorithm>
using namespace std;
const int maxd = 2e5+10;
int d[maxd],vis[maxd],cnt[maxd],n,m;
typedef pair<int,int> P;
vector<P> G[maxd],e;
int main()
{
//    freopen("a.in","r",stdin);
//    freopen("k.out","w",stdout);
    while(scanf("%d %d",&n,&m)!=EOF)
    {
        for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++)
        {
            int u,v;scanf("%d %d", &u, &v);
            e.push_back(P(u,v));
            ++d[u], ++d[v];
        }
        for (int i = 0; i < m; i++)
        {
            int u = e[i].first, v = e[i].second;
            if (d[u] < d[v] || (d[u] == d[v] && u > v)) swap(u, v);

            G[u].push_back(P(v, i+1));
        }
        for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        {
            for (P u:G[i]) vis[u.first] = u.second;
            for (P u:G[i])
                for (P v:G[u.first])
                    if (vis[v.first])
                        ++cnt[v.second], ++cnt[u.second], ++cnt[vis[v.first]];

            for (P u:G[i]) vis[u.first] = 0;
        }
        long long ans = 0ll;
        for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++)
        {
            ans += 1ll * cnt[i] * (cnt[i] - 1) / 2;
            cnt[i] = 0;
        }

        for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) G[i].clear(),d[i] = 0; e.clear();
        printf("%lld\n", ans);
    }
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 「HDU 5985」Lucky Coins
entry.summary: Bob has collected a lot of coins in different kinds. He wants to know which kind of coins is lucky. He finds out a lucky kind of coins by the following way. He tosses all the coins simultaneously, and then removes the coins that come up tails. He then tosses all the remaining coins and removes the coins that come up tails. He repeats the previous step until there is one kind of coins remaining or there are no coins remaining. If there is one kind of coins remaining, then this kind of coins is lucky. Given the number of coins and the probability that the coins come up heads after tossing for each kind, your task is to calculate the probability for each kind of coins that will be lucky.
entry.content:
Bob has collected a lot of coins in different kinds. He wants to know which kind of coins is lucky. He finds out a lucky kind of coins by the following way. He tosses all the coins simultaneously, and then removes the coins that come up tails. He then tosses all the remaining coins and removes the coins that come up tails. He repeats the previous step until there is one kind of coins remaining or there are no coins remaining. If there is one kind of coins remaining, then this kind of coins is lucky. Given the number of coins and the probability that the coins come up heads after tossing for each kind, your task is to calculate the probability for each kind of coins that will be lucky.

链接🔗

「HDU 5985」Lucky Coins

题解

第iii种硬币,有nin_ini​枚，前kkk次以内全部反面的概率为 die[i][k]=(1−pik)nidie[i][k] = (1-p_i^k)^{n_i}die[i][k]=(1−pik​)ni​
pikp_i^kpik​ 表示这个硬币抛kkk次全都正面的概率，1−pik1-p_i^k1−pik​ 表示至少出现一次反面的概率
然后 live[i][k]=1−die[i][k]live[i][k] = 1 - die[i][k]live[i][k]=1−die[i][k] ,表示前第iii种硬币kkk次至少有一枚没有全部反面的概率
那么第iii枚硬币的答案等于

ans[i]=∑j=1200∑k=1,k!=in(live[i][j]−live[i][j+1])×die[k][j]ans[i] = \sum_{j=1}^{200} \sum_{k=1,k!=i}^n (live[i][j] - live[i][j+1]) \times die[k][j] ans[i]=j=1∑200​k=1,k!=i∑n​(live[i][j]−live[i][j+1])×die[k][j]

表示第jjj轮存活的概率加上其他所有硬币前jjj轮抛弃的概率,然后答案就是每一轮存活概率的总和

代码

#include <cstdio>
using namespace std;
const int maxd = 205;
int n,m,t;
int a[11];
double b[11];
double die[11][maxd],live[11][maxd];
double pow(double x,int y)
{
    double now = 1.0;
    while(y)
    {
        if(y%2 == 1) now *= x;
        x = x * x;
        y/=2;
    }
    return now;
}
int main()
{
//    freopen("a.in","r",stdin);
//    freopen("k.out","w",stdout);
    scanf("%d",&t);
    while(t--)
    {
        scanf("%d",&n);
        for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) scanf("%d %lf",&a[i],&b[i]);
        if(n == 1)
        {
            printf("1.000000\n");
            continue;
        }
        for(int i=1;i<=n;i++)
        {
            for(int j=1;j<=201;j++)
            {
                double k = pow(b[i],j);
                k = 1.0 - k;

                die[i][j] = pow(k,a[i]);
                live[i][j] = 1.0 - die[i][j];
            }
        }
        for(int i=1;i<=n;i++)
        {
            double ans = 0.0;
            for(int j=1;j<=200;j++)
            {
                double now = live[i][j] - live[i][j+1];
                for(int k=1;k<=n;k++)
                {
                    if(i == k) continue;
                    now *= die[k][j];
                }
                ans += now;
            }
            printf("%.6lf",ans);
            if(i!=n) putchar(' ');
        }
        putchar(10);
    }
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 「HDU 5988」Coding Contest
entry.summary: A coding contest will be held in this university, in a huge playground. The whole playground would be divided into N blocks, and there would be M directed paths linking these blocks. The i-th path goes from the ui-th block to the vi-th block. Your task is to solve the lunch issue. According to the arrangement, there are si competitors in the i-th block. Limited to the size of table, bi bags of lunch including breads, sausages and milk would be put in the i-th block. As a result, some competitors need to move to another block to access lunch. However, the playground is temporary, as a result there would be so many wires on the path.
entry.content:
A coding contest will be held in this university, in a huge playground. The whole playground would be divided into N blocks, and there would be M directed paths linking these blocks. The i-th path goes from the ui-th block to the vi-th block. Your task is to solve the lunch issue. According to the arrangement, there are si competitors in the i-th block. Limited to the size of table, bi bags of lunch including breads, sausages and milk would be put in the i-th block. As a result, some competitors need to move to another block to access lunch. However, the playground is temporary, as a result there would be so many wires on the path.

For the i-th path, the wires have been stabilized at first and the first competitor who walker through it would not break the wires. Since then, however, when a person go through the i - th path, there is a chance of pi to touch
the wires and affect the whole networks. Moreover, to protect these wires, no more than ci competitors are allowed to walk through the i-th path.
Now you need to find a way for all competitors to get their lunch, and minimize the possibility of network crashing.

链接🔗

「HDU 5988」Coding Contest

题解

按最小费用最大流建边
然后因为概率是乘法，但是费用流部分统计答案用的是加法，所以先取个对数，x∗y=exp(lg(x)+ln(y))x * y = exp(lg(x) + ln(y))x∗y=exp(lg(x)+ln(y)) 等于对数的数加，然后再跑费用流

代码

#include<cstdio>
#include<algorithm>
#include<cstring>
#include<queue>
#include<vector>
#include <cmath>
using namespace std;
typedef long long ll;
const int inf = 0x3f3f3f3f;
const int maxd = 205;
const double eps = 0.000001;
struct Edge
{
    int to, rev;
    int flow;
    double cost;
};

int num; // 默认点的范围从0开始，num为最大点数
vector<Edge> edge[maxd];
double h[maxd],dis[maxd];
int pre_node[maxd], pre_edge[maxd];

void add(int u, int v, int flow, double cost)
{
    edge[u].push_back((Edge){ v,(int)edge[v].size(),flow,cost });
    edge[v].push_back((Edge){ u,(int)edge[u].size() - 1,0,-cost });

}
typedef pair<double,int> P;
void min_cost_flow(int s, int t, double& min_cost, int& max_flow)
{
    fill(h, h + num+1, 0.0);
    min_cost = 0.0 ; max_flow = 0.0;
    int tot = inf;
    while (tot > 0)
    {
        priority_queue<P, vector<P>, greater<P> > q;
        fill(dis, dis + num +1, inf);
        dis[s] = 0.0; q.push(P( dis[s],s));
        while (!q.empty())
        {
            int u = q.top().second;
            int dist = q.top().first;
            q.pop();
            if (dis[u] < dist)continue;
            for (int i = 0;i < edge[u].size(); i++)
            {
                Edge e = edge[u][i];
                if (e.flow > 0 && dis[e.to] - (dis[u] + e.cost + h[u] - h[e.to]) >= eps )
                {

                    dis[e.to] = dis[u] +e.cost + h[u] - h[e.to];
                    pre_node[e.to] = u;
                    pre_edge[e.to] = i;
                    q.push(P(dis[e.to],e.to ));

                }
            }
        }

        if (fabs(dis[t] - inf) <= eps) return;
        //  这里注意点的范围
        for (int i = 0;i <= num;i++) {
            h[i] += dis[i];
            //printf("%lf ",dis[i]);
        }
        //putchar(10);
        int flow = tot;
        for (int i = t; i != s; i = pre_node[i])
            flow = min(flow, edge[pre_node[i]][pre_edge[i]].flow);

        for (int i = t; i != s; i = pre_node[i])
        {
            Edge& e = edge[pre_node[i]][pre_edge[i]];
            e.flow -= flow;
            edge[i][e.rev].flow += flow;
        }
        tot -= flow;
        max_flow += flow;
        min_cost += flow * h[t];

        //printf("%d %lf %d %lf %d %lf\n",tot,dis[t],flow,min_cost,t,h[t]);
    }
}
void init()
{
    for(int i=0;i<=num;i++) edge[i].clear();
}
int main()
{
//    freopen("a.in","r",stdin);
//    freopen("k.out","w",stdout);
    int s,t,T;
    scanf("%d",&T);
    while(T--)
    {
        int n,m;
        scanf("%d %d",&n,&m);init();
        s = 0, t = n+1; num =  t;
        for(int i=1;i<=n;i++)
        {
            int a,b;scanf("%d %d",&a,&b);
            int x=min(a,b);
            a-=x,b-=x;
            if(a>0) add(s,i,a,0);
            else if(b>0) add(i,t,b,0);
            //printf("%d %d %d\n",a,b,a-b);
        }
        for(int i=1;i<=m;i++)
        {
            int a,b,c; double d;
            scanf("%d %d %d %lf",&a,&b,&c,&d);
            if(c) add(a,b,1,0);
            if(c>1)add(a,b,c-1,-1*log(1.0-d));
        }
        double min_cost = 0.0;
        int max_flow= 0;
        min_cost_flow(s,t,min_cost,max_flow);
        printf("%.2lf\n",1.0 - exp(-1.0 * min_cost));
    }
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 组合数学公式
entry.content:
• 组合数

Cnm=n!m!(n−m)!C^m_{n} = \frac{n!}{m!(n-m)!} Cnm​=m!(n−m)!n!​

  • 多重集合排列数

n!a1!a2!a3!⋯ak!\frac{n!}{a_1! a_2! a_3! \cdots a_k!} a1​!a2​!a3​!⋯ak​!n!​

  • 多重集合组合数(任意ni>=rn_i >= rni​>=r)

Ck+r−1k−1C^{k-1}_{k+r-1} Ck+r−1k−1​

  • 多重集合组合数

Ck+r−1k−1−∑i=1kCk+r−ni−2k−1+∑i=1kCk+r−ni−2k−1+⋯+(−1)k+1Ck+r−∑i=1kni−(k+1)k−1C_{k+r-1}^{k-1} - \sum_{i=1}^{k} C_{k+r-n_i-2}^{k-1} + \sum_{i=1}^{k} C_{k+r-n_i-2}^{k-1}+\cdots + (-1)^{k+1} C^{k-1}_{k+r -\sum_{i=1}^{k}n_i - (k+1)} Ck+r−1k−1​−i=1∑k​Ck+r−ni​−2k−1​+i=1∑k​Ck+r−ni​−2k−1​+⋯+(−1)k+1Ck+r−∑i=1k​ni​−(k+1)k−1​

  • 卢卡斯定理

Cnm≡C(n mod p)(m mod p)×Cn/pm/p( mod p)C_{n}^{m} \equiv C_{(n \text{ mod } p)}^{(m \text{ mod } p)} \times C_{n / p}^{m / p} ( \text{ mod } p) Cnm​≡C(n mod p)(m mod p)​×Cn/pm/p​( mod p)

  • Catalan

Catn=C2nnn+1Cat_n = \frac{C_{2n}^{n}}{n+1} Catn​=n+1C2nn​​

  • N∗4N * 4N∗4 格子中用 1∗21 * 21∗2 或 2∗12 * 12∗1 填充的方案数

f(n)=f(n−1)+5⋅f(n−2)+f(n−3)−f(n−4)f(n) = f(n-1) + 5 \cdot f(n-2) + f(n-3) - f(n-4) f(n)=f(n−1)+5⋅f(n−2)+f(n−3)−f(n−4)

  • N∗4N * 4N∗4 格子中用 1∗11 * 11∗1 或 2∗22 * 22∗2 填充的方案数

f(n)=2⋅f(n−1)+3⋅f(n−2)−2⋅f(n−3)f(n) = 2 \cdot f(n-1) + 3 \cdot f(n-2) - 2 \cdot f(n-3) f(n)=2⋅f(n−1)+3⋅f(n−2)−2⋅f(n−3)

entry.title: 「HDU 6185」Covering
entry.summary:
Bob's school has a big playground, boys and girls always play games here after school.

To protect boys and girls from getting hurt when playing happily on the playground, rich boy Bob decided to cover the playground using his carpets.

Meanwhile, Bob is a mean boy, so he acquired that his carpets can not overlap one cell twice or more.
entry.content:
Bob's school has a big playground, boys and girls always play games here after school.

To protect boys and girls from getting hurt when playing happily on the playground, rich boy Bob decided to cover the playground using his carpets.

Meanwhile, Bob is a mean boy, so he acquired that his carpets can not overlap one cell twice or more.

He has infinite carpets with sizes of 1×2 and 2×1, and the size of the playground is 4×n.

Can you tell Bob the total number of schemes where the carpets can cover the playground completely without overlapping?

链接🔗

「HDU 6185」Covering

题解

设f(x)f(x)f(x)为 4∗n4*n4∗n 的摆法方案数，
考n=2n=2n=2的5种情况
|1|1| |1|2| |1|1| |1|1| |1|2|
|2|2| |1|2| |2|3| |2|2| |1|2|
|3|3| |3|4| |2|3| |3|4| |3|3|
|4|4| |3|4| |4|4| |3|4| |4|4|

如果最后两行按照 方案1的摆法，那么剩下部分的摆法方案数为 f(n-2)
如果最后两行按照 方案2的摆法，因为方案2的摆法，每一列是独立的，所以剩下部分的摆法方案数为f(n-1)
如果最后两行按照 方案3的摆法，那么方案数为f(n-2)，又因为方案可以进一步错位，变成

|1|1| -> |1|1|6|6| （(2,2)与(3,2)的格子旋转一下）
|2|4| -> |2|4|4|8|
|2|4| -> |2|5|5|8|
|3|3| -> |3|3|7|7|

因为这个4∗44*44∗4的格子属于一个整体(不能被任意的4∗n4*n4∗n分割)，所以方案数也可以为f(n−4)f(n-4)f(n−4)
可以发现，这个4∗44*44∗4的格子也可以扩展到6∗66*66∗6,所以方案数为f(n−2)+f(n−4)+f(n−6)+⋯f(n-2) + f(n-4) + f(n-6)+ \cdotsf(n−2)+f(n−4)+f(n−6)+⋯(f(0)f(0)f(0)或F(1)F(1)F(1))(根据nnn的奇偶性判断)

方案4，5，情况相同，拓展方式与方案3类似，自己推下就好

于是可以得到
f(n)=f(n−1)+f(n−2)+(f(n−2)+f(n−4)+⋯+f(0))+2⋅(f(n−2)+f(n−3)+f(n−4)+⋯+f(0))f(n) = f(n-1) + f(n-2) + ( f(n-2) + f(n-4) + \cdots + f(0) ) + 2 \cdot (f(n-2) + f(n-3) + f(n-4) + \cdots + f(0))f(n)=f(n−1)+f(n−2)+(f(n−2)+f(n−4)+⋯+f(0))+2⋅(f(n−2)+f(n−3)+f(n−4)+⋯+f(0))

接着裂项相减 (f(n)−f(n−2))(f(n) - f(n-2))(f(n)−f(n−2))代入上式子后合并得到
f(n)=f(n−1)+f(n−2)⋅5+f(n−3)−f(n−4)f(n) = f(n-1) + f(n-2) \cdot 5 + f(n-3) - f(n-4)f(n)=f(n−1)+f(n−2)⋅5+f(n−3)−f(n−4)

因为n<=1018n<=10^{18}n<=1018
并且我们发现式子可以转化为矩阵乘法表示

|1,5,1,-1| - |f(n-1)|
|0,1,5,1| - |f(n-2)|
|1,0,0,0| * |f(n-3)|
|0,0,1,0| - |f(n-4)|

然后用矩阵快速幂即可

代码

#include <cstdio>
#include <cstring>
#include <algorithm>
using namespace std;
const int mod = 1e9+7;
struct matrix
{
    long long a[4][4];
};
matrix matrix_mul(matrix A, matrix B,int n)
{
    matrix C;
    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i)
        for (int j = 0; j < n; ++j)
        {
            C.a[i][j] = 0;
            for (int k = 0; k < n; ++k) C.a[i][j] = (C.a[i][j] +  (A.a[i][k] * B.a[k][j] % mod)) %mod;
        }
    return C;
}
matrix unit(int n)
{
    matrix res;
    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i)
        for (int j = 0; j < n; ++j)
            if (i == j) res.a[i][j] = 1;
            else res.a[i][j] = 0;
    return res;
}
matrix matrix_pow(matrix A, long long b,int n)
{
    matrix res = unit(n), temp = A;
    for (; b; b >>=1) {
        if (b & 1) res = matrix_mul(res, temp,n);
        temp = matrix_mul(temp, temp,n);
    }
    return res;
}
int main()
{
//    freopen("a.in","r",stdin);
//    freopen("k.out","w",stdout);
    long long n;
    while(scanf("%lld",&n)!=EOF)
    {
        if(n==1)
        {
            printf("1\n");
            continue;
        }
        if(n==2)
        {
            printf("5\n");
            continue;
        }
        if(n==3)
        {
            printf("11\n");
            continue;
        }
        if(n==4)
        {
            printf("36\n");
            continue;
        }
        matrix x,y;
        x.a[0][0] = 1; x.a[0][1] = 5; x.a[0][2] = 1; x.a[0][3] = -1;
        x.a[1][0] = 1; x.a[1][1] = 0; x.a[1][2] = 0; x.a[1][3] = 0;
        x.a[2][0] = 0; x.a[2][1] = 1; x.a[2][2] = 0; x.a[2][3] = 0;
        x.a[3][0] = 0; x.a[3][1] = 0; x.a[3][2] = 1; x.a[3][3] = 0;

        y.a[0][0] = 36; y.a[0][1] = 0; y.a[0][2] = 0; y.a[0][3] = 0;
        y.a[1][0] = 11; y.a[1][1] = 0; y.a[1][2] = 0; y.a[1][3] = 0;
        y.a[2][0] = 5; y.a[2][1] = 0; y.a[2][2] = 0; y.a[2][3] = 0;
        y.a[3][0] = 1; y.a[3][1] = 0; y.a[3][2] = 0; y.a[3][3] = 0;
        matrix z = matrix_pow(x,n-4,4);
        matrix ans = matrix_mul(z,y,4);
        long long aa = ans.a[0][0];
        printf("%lld\n",(aa%mod+mod)%mod);
    }
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 2019 年比赛总结
entry.content:
在熟悉的深航音乐响起后没，飞机抵达了深圳机场。窗外闪烁着的灯光，意味着今年的比赛终要告一段落了

今年的历程

  • 2月 广东工业大学集训
  • 3月 蓝桥杯省赛
  • 4月 团体程序程序设计天梯赛
  • 5月 GDCPC，蓝桥国赛
  • 7月 中山大学集训
  • 9月 ICPC&CCPC 网络赛
  • 10月 银川站
  • 11月 上海站

看着Vjudge的Register 30 months ago，我的竞赛经历也走过了两年了。想起去年ccpc camp wls的十年竞赛经历， 以及前天八年经验的清华选手，我都现的无比稚嫩。但还是感觉自己已经在圈子里呆了许久，但却依然菜的真实。

无论是上半年的蓝桥国赛，CPC省赛，还是年末的两场区域赛，都挺让老师失望的吧。



银川站

本着为了拿牌推动校内竞赛发展的想法，老班带领我们来到了石嘴山，开启了第一次ICPC之旅
在机场有幸见到了北大的队伍，他们在等巴士时仍然开着电脑在学习(这可能是就是我们之间的差距吧)。
在坐了将近一个钟的大巴之后，我们到达了酒店，10月底的石嘴山并没有想象中的那么冷。
可能是因为第一次坐飞机太激动了，到达酒店后又迷迷糊糊睡了一下午。
晚上逛了逛石嘴山市区吧，发现这里有万达还是挺意外的，交通挺便宜的，基本都是5块钱(除了去学校吧)
现场有400支队伍，比较的挤，不过桌面空间挺大的，还能接受。热身赛调了调编译器，是Ubuntu 环境，也是第一次用吧。
晚上吃了食堂的饭，饭票给的有点多，有点没吃完。


正式赛
开场快速过了签到，然后把另外一道之前做过的B切了，接着发现了一道进制转化的题目
发现了该题需要高精度后，便叫同学开始抄高精度的板子，接着看到了一道之前在书上见到过的原题
板子抄完后一堆编译报错(平时练习赛全是copy的)
调完以后交上去返回TLE，于是开始怀疑时间复杂度是否过高(对板子的时间复杂度不是彻底理解，于是开始怀疑正确做法是否是一步公式法转化)
在短暂的僵局之后，迅速把线段树给切了,之后就开始决定搞进制转化or原题。
在抉择之后，决定尝试先用python把进制转换过了，然后再码另一题
接着又暴露了问题，对python不熟，在python中没有字符类型，需要用函数转化，但是并不知道。接着提出一个100多行的if else赋值的傻办法，但否定了。(赛后这里应该是最大的决策失误)
在最后一个半钟的时间，把原题码了，但wa了。(练习做少了，没有考虑到图论的一些坑点)
最后依然无法解决这两个问题，当然也没有去尝试后面的题，于是遗憾打铁。

总结

组队训练比较少，赛中做了很多错误决策，也有点紧张
平时练习copy多，赛场上抄板子容易抄错
过多的口胡一些题目，导致一些坑点没有经历过


赛后提前离场了，比较失落吧。晚上老班请我们到万达吃了饭。
第二天起床便赶往了机场


上海站

今年能拿到上海站的资格也是挺幸运的把，擦边+CCSP竞赛
因为一些原因，行程订的挺赶的，周六前往，周日返程
飞机落地后就直接地铁来到了上海大学报道，上大的午饭非常好吃。


热身赛 场馆相比于宁夏宽敞很多，应该是最后一场区域赛的原因吧，周围坐满了各种985/211高校，不过相较于上次比赛，并没有那么紧张。 热身赛开场读题读错，导致排名倒数。第二题因为不了解bitset时间复杂度，导致否定了bitset做法。第四题本想暴力搞，但因为某些原因从而放弃。不过这是热身赛吧，也并不是很重要。

晚上跟广工的闷骚Inctry面基，去吃了一顿老北京火锅(羊肉有点骚，不过味道还是不错的)


现场赛
因为路过气球室，发现粉色气球很多，于是开场便叫同学阅读A题，但发现上当了，A不太可做。
接着看到一血K产生了，于是看了看K题面，发现并没有啥想法。
转头开始尝试做B，花了一点时间把B做完以后。就开始了将近4小时的垃圾时间。
K题其实已经想出了正确解法，但因为最后如果枚举边判断是M时间复杂度，而如果尝试优化一下，只枚举二分图左边的点，可能会少一些常数，但总体最大时间复杂度是不变的。因此我们的K被关了。
D题没啥想法，但是由于周围队都过了，于是便决定在该题上花费些许时间，但却没有任何进展。
E题因该是最需要反省的，很简单的应用，但没有找到问题的本质是要我们求什么，也因为剩余时间是在不多了，心态可能有点轻微放弃吧。
H题比较薄弱，如果前面题都挺顺利的，花点时间应该是可以突破一下
F题赛中没有看到了，挺裸的一道树剖吧，不过立方和需要推下公式。


也许也许多交几次或者加个快读K就过了吧，也许多看看E的图就能发现题目的本质吧
但终究还是菜，一如既往的菜。
赛后没有见到老班，可能真的令他太失望了吧。

闭幕式滚榜的时候，技术支持做的很好，老师的主持也十分有趣。
平时不喜欢拍照，却有点羡慕滚榜时赛场上的队伍照片。
铜牌就能在屏幕上看到自己队伍的照片了吧。


临走之前，在上大逛了一会，见了下上大的初中同学，感觉彼此都没啥变化。
想看看东方明珠，想去去陆家嘴。但去了应该也不会开心吧。



结束啦，今年的比赛。
虽然挺失望的，差一点的特等，差一点的牌子。
但，我不会放弃的。
它实在是太迷人了
赛场周围的志愿者穿梭的身影，桌面上的队伍台历，电脑旁飘着的彩色气球
赛后的滚榜，以及拿牌后的喜悦。
加油吧，"So Nice Chicken , Fighting For Au 2020"
